results.rendered_html:
akarṇa a. [nāsti karṇo yasya]
1 Devoid of ears; deaf.
2 Destitute of Karṇa; anarjunamakarṇaṃ vājagadadyeti niścitaḥ  Mb. 
— rṇaḥ A serpent (tasya cakṣuṣaiva śravaṇāt, hence also called cakṣuḥśravāḥ)
